title.en: But even so, they did not dare to flee, or they...

content.en:
Ye Tian found that these Fifth Realms not only mined the veins very slowly, but also their bodies were extremely weak, and some of them had even decayed in their bodies, and the dimensional void in their bodies was about to collapse, and it was estimated that they would not live long.

But even so, they did not dare to flee, or they would surely die.

Ye Tian didn't sympathize with these Fifth Realms, he continued to mine the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, he had to mine 10,000 pieces of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein before he could obtain the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid reward.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to bombard the cave wall with all his might.

Thundered!!!!

Stone chips fell, but no Spell Gold ore was found.

The power here prevented his soul will from snooping, and even the soul will of the twelfth dimension had difficulty peering into the walls and perceiving the situation inside.

After a long time, Ye Tian smashed a lot of stone walls, and only then did he find a piece of Spell Spirit Gold Ore.

"This Purgatory Holy Sect's mission is even worse than the Baiye Chamber of Commerce!"

Ye Tian was helpless.

No wonder the Sixth Realm here is so rare, those 03rd Sixth Realms would rather refine the top-level dimensional Tongbao for the Baiye Chamber of Commerce than come here!

However, he didn't care, and continued to mine the Spell Spirit Gold Ore.

Time flies.

Piece after piece of Spell Spirit Gold Ore was mined by him, but his body also had a more serious reaction.

But he didn't care, and continued to dig for the Spell Spirit Gold Ore.

Finally, on this day, he had gathered 10,000 pieces of spell gold.

However, he did not leave, but continued to mine.

Combat kills are not allowed here, otherwise if the Purgatory Holy Sect knows about it, they will definitely be killed.

Therefore, he didn't have to worry about having an invincible powerhouse in the sixth realm come to kill him and snatch the spell spirit gold.

Before you know it, another long time has passed.

However.

this day.

Ye Tian saw an acquaintance here.

"Extinction Realm Lord, it's him, how did he come here?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

When the fifth realm comes here, it's almost death!

Swish!

Ye Tian came to the Extinction Realm Lord and met the Extinction Realm Lord.

And when the Extinction Realm Lord saw the comer, he was immediately surprised: "Ye Tian Realm Lord, you are also here!"

"Extinction Realm Lord, why are you here?" Ye Tian asked.

The Extinction Realm Lord was a little embarrassed, and said, "Since the Death Multidimensional Tribulation, I used a special way to come to the Upper Domain, and then joined a force, but this force offended the Purgatory Holy Sect, and then it was destroyed, and then I was arrested and sent here. "

Immediately, he asked Ye Tian curiously: "Ye Tian Realm Lord, why are you here?"

"I'm here to mine for the mission of the Purgatory Holy Sect!" Ye Tian explained briefly and didn't say much.

Then.

The Extinction Realm Lord begged, "Ye Tian Realm Lord, is there any way you can help me leave, if I continue to stay here, I will die!"

Ye Tian frowned, it was only a fifth realm, and it was a fifth realm that had not been joined for a long time, and the Purgatory Holy Sect would definitely not care too much, and if he paid a certain price, he would definitely be able to save it.

But why did he save the Lord of the Extinction Realm?

The price he needs to pay is certainly too big to be worth it.

Seeing Ye Tian's hesitation, the Lord of the Extinction Realm also knew that he was not qualified to make Ye Tian pay a big price to save himself.

So, he revealed a message: "Ye Tian Realm Lord, I know of an opportunity in the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, if you save me, I will tell you." "

"Is there still a chance for the Spell Spirit Gold Vein?" Ye Tian was a little unconvinced, "If there is really a fate, the Purgatory Holy Sect will take it by itself, will it be left to us?"

"No, that chance is located in the depths of the Spell Spirit Vein, I saw a Sixth Realm who escaped from the depths of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, the other party just wanted to spy on the opportunity there, but he couldn't withstand the power of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, so he fell. But I also know what's there, and if you get me out, I'll tell you exactly where it is, so I can save time, and maybe find a way to get out alive. The Extinction Realm Lord said.

"Let's talk about the chance first, if it really helps me a lot, I will save you out!" Ye Tian promised.

The Extinction Realm Lord believed in Ye Tian, so he revealed: "Okay, Ye Tian Realm Lord, then I will say, in the depths of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, there is a special stone, and that special stone can assist in comprehending the dimensional rules, I only know that the sixth realm only had a short period of enlightenment, and the dimensional rule realm skyrocketed." It's a pity that the opponent's strength was slightly worse and he didn't take the stone. "

Ye Tian is interested, and he can make the dimensional rules of the sixth realm skyrocket in a short period of time, and the dimensional treasure can't do it!

Obviously, the value of that stone is above the dimensional treasure, no wonder the Lord of the Extinction Realm said that it was a great opportunity.

Of course, if you don't have the strength to take it, it will not be a chance, but a disaster.

"Okay, I promise to get you out!"

"Make a natal oath first!"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian made an oath, and the Extinction Realm Lord also made an oath.

After that, Ye Tian went to find a sixth realm of the Purgatory Holy Sect.

Sure enough, he told the Sixth Realm about the matter, and then reported it, and the Purgatory Holy Sect gave a price, that is, 10,000 pieces of Spell Spirit Gold Ore.

As long as you turn these in, you can take away the Extinction Realm Lord with 480, but you won't be able to get rewards either.

Ye Tian nodded and agreed to the transaction.

Subsequently, he took out 10,000 pieces of Spell Spirit Gold Ore, and then successfully left with the Extinction Realm Lord.

......

"Extinction Realm Lord, be careful in the future!"

Ye Tian reminded.

"I know!" "The Extinction Realm Lord hurriedly replied, he had been in the Spell Spirit Gold Vein for many years this time, and his physical injuries were very serious, if he didn't solve his physical injuries, he would be hopeless in the Sixth Realm in the future.

And the Extinction Realm Lord also informed Ye Tian of the location of the stone, and turned to leave.

And not long after the Extinction Realm Lord left, Ye Tian returned to the Spell Spirit Gold Vein again, and then continued to mine, he was not in a hurry to explore the depths of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, but first obtained enough Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid.

Otherwise, once something happens and he has no mines to mine, he won't be able to gather enough Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid.

In a flash, a long time passed.

Ye Tian dug up a total of 100,000 pieces of Spell Spirit Gold Ore, and then went out, exchanged for ten bottles of Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid, and then after cultivating for a period of time, he continued to come here to mine.

And just like that, another long period of time passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already obtained a lot of Heavenly Marrow Golden Liquid, and his cultivation was also progressing towards the peak of the Sixth Realm step by step.
